name: rugsense-mcp
description: MCP server for RugSense — score freshly-launched Base tokens (rug/honeypot risk → AVOID/WATCH/HOT) over x402, with a verifiable point-in-time track record, lifecycle webhook alerts, and an accumulating deployer dossier. Tools: get_base_launches, check_base_token, check_base_tokens_batch, quick_check_base_token, watch_base_token, get_base_deployer_dossier, get_rugsense_track_record.
